item.title: These 3 Defense Giants Beat Q1 Estimates—So Why Did Their Stocks Still Fall?
item.description: GE Aerospace, Northrop Grumman, and RTX each beat Q1 2026 earnings estimates but sold off after failing to raise full-year guidance, despite analyst M...

item.title: Tractor Supply’s 10% Culling: A Bruise, Not a Break
item.description: Tractor Supply Company's recent stock decline may overshadow its steady revenue growth, reaffirmed annual guidance, and consistent dividend history.

item.title: Aehr Test Systems: Small AI Stock Sees Record AI Hyperscaler Order
item.description: Aehr Test Systems is a small AI stock that is seeing a rapid increase in demand. An AI hyperscaler just awarded the firm its largest order ever.

item.title: Alcoa Rebounds as Aluminum Tightens, But a Q1 Miss Tests the Rally
item.description: Alcoa missed Q1 2026 estimates, but aluminum prices above $3,557 per metric ton and Middle East supply disruptions keep the bullish case for AA stock ...
